summary: Audit Log — full-text search across historical exports
description_md:
As a compliance-officer, I want to perform full-text search across historical audit log exports so that I can quickly locate specific compliance events and transactions without manually reviewing each exported file.

**Background**:
Our compliance vault stores audit log exports with retention policies, but currently there is no efficient way to search across historical exports. This gap forces compliance officers to manually review large datasets, increasing the time required for audits and investigations.

**Acceptance Criteria**:
1. Search interface allows compliance officers to enter keywords and phrases to query across all historical audit log exports
2. Search results display matching snippets with highlighted terms, along with metadata including export date, tenant, and data source
3. Filter options enable narrowing results by date range, PII category, and workspace
4. Search performance returns results within 3 seconds for datasets up to 100,000 exported records

comments.author: dev2@amisol-demo.example
comments.body_md: Started implementing Elasticsearch-based indexing for audit log exports. Awaiting confirmation on retention policy integration.
